response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no evidence of C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no experience with Linux kernel modification, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated expertise in open-source project leadership and DevOps infrastructure
Proven ability to work on performance-critical systems and real-time applications
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX environments
Zero mention of Linux kernel analysis or modification skills
No Japanese language proficiency; only English, Romanian, and basic German listed
